description: M91002 default user/system settings. The UI fetches this file when loading categories and when Create default settings is clicked.

systemSettingCategories.CATEGORY_DESC: Manage your login information, email, and password.

DEFAULTS.SETTING_DESC: System logo image URL or data URL. Recommended 160x40px. It is displayed with automatic proportional scaling.
UI language code. en or ko. Changes are applied after logout and next login.

systemSettingCategories.CATEGORY_DESC: Include and exclude constraints used by the M02002 target table explorer.

DEFAULTS.SETTING_DESC: Exclude table LIKE patterns. Enter one pattern per line.
Included owners. Enter one owner per line.

systemSettingCategories.CATEGORY_DESC: Per-user and Target DB connection requested limits. Effective values cannot exceed the server environment hard caps.

DEFAULTS.SETTING_DESC: Requested Target DB pool wait time in milliseconds. The effective value is capped by the server TARGET_DB_POOL_WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS environment value.
Requested maximum rows loaded into memory for one ML analysis. The effective value is capped by the server APP_ML_MAX_IN_MEMORY_ROWS environment value.
Requested maximum input features for one ML analysis. The effective value is capped by the server APP_ML_MAX_INPUT_FEATURES environment value.
Rule summary browser request timeout in milliseconds. The effective value is capped by the server APP_RULE_SUMMARY_TIMEOUT_MS environment value and is loaded once per login session.
Maximum browser log lines retained in the bottom Network / Run Log panel.
